item.title: Cryptomining: Harmless Nuisance or Disruptive Threat?
item.description: Cryptocurrency mining is legal, but fraudulently compromising systems is not. Learn about this new threat from CrowdStrike® experts.

item.title: CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz: Balanced Cybersecurity Portfolio
item.description: Article in Forbes features CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz discussing the importance of creating a balanced cybersecurity platform.

item.title: CrowdStrike Falcon® Offers Plug-and-Play Integration with ServiceNow
item.description: The CrowdStrike Falcon® platform integrates seamlessly with ServiceNow, allowing for consumption of the Falcon platform's security alerts.

item.title: Global Threat Report Reveals Trends, Insights, Threat Actors
item.description: The CrowdStrike 2018 Global Threat Report reveals cyberattack trends, statistics and threat actors you need to know to inform your cybersecurity strategy

item.title: Franchise Relationships Create Unique Cybersecurity Risks
item.description: Learn why franchise organizations face unique cybersecurity risks and get guidance on how they can improve their security strategies.

item.title: Why North Korean Cyberwarfare is Likely to Intensify
item.description: Impending negotiations between North Korea and the U.S. increase the chance of cyberattacks against U.S. government, media and infrastructure targets.

item.title: A Hunter’s Perspective: Detecting Formbook 3.8 Activity in Your Environment
item.description: Formbook is a tool used by threat actors to steal data; learn how you can hunt for its malicious presence in your environment.

item.title: Operators of SamSam Continue to Receive Significant Ransom Payments
item.description: The SamSam (Samas) ransomware attack on Atlanta will not be the last of these targeted, enterprise attacks, according to CrowdStrike security experts.

item.title: Hidden Administrative Accounts: BloodHound to the Rescue
item.description: Learn how cybercriminals use hidden administrative accounts to access your data and why BloodHound is the tool red teams use to find them.

item.title: CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz in Entrepreneur Magazine: What It Takes to Lead
item.description: Entrepreneur magazine interviews George Kurtz on his journey to becoming CEO of CrowdStrike and his advice to other startup leaders.

item.title: Building Cybersecurity from the Ground Up — Part 1: The Business Perspective
item.description: The CrowdStrike Services team examines the business processes organizations should assess and improve to fortify their cybersecurity posture.

item.title: CrowdStrike Discusses “Breakout Time” in an Article on Dark Reading
item.description: Learn why “breakout time” the time between when an intruder gets on a machine and when he can move to other systems is a critical window.

item.title: Building Cybersecurity from the Ground Up — Part 2: The Technology Basics
item.description: The CrowdStrike Services team examines the technology basics organization need to adopt and improve to fortify their cybersecurity posture.

item.title: Falcon Prevent Free Trial: Because Evaluating Next-Gen AV Solutions Should Be Fast and Easy
item.description: Get a free trial of Falcon Prevent, CrowdStrike's Next Generation Antivirus solution.

item.title: An In-Depth Analysis of Samsam Ransomware and BOSS SPIDER
item.description: Gain an in-depth analysis of Samsam ransomware, associated with the adversary BOSS SPIDER; learn how it functions and how CrowdStrike Falcon® Prevent™ stops it.

item.title: Address Zero-Day Threats Long Before an Attack Occurs
item.description: Defending against zero-days requires hardening systems and applying next-generation endpoint protection — learn the defense strategies you need.

item.title: HIPAA PHI Getting Tougher to Safeguard but Compliance is Still Critical
item.description: HIPAA compliance was enacted to safeguard protected healthcare information (PHI), learn why having the right endpoint protection in place is critical.

item.title: CCleaner Backdoor: Analysis & Recommendations - CrowdStrike
item.description: Learn about the CCleaner 5.33 backdoor vulnerability found embedded in signed versions of the software. CrowdStrike walks through a technical analysis, the payload, how it gathers victim information, recommendations, and more.

item.title: Software Supply Chain Attacks on the Rise, Undermining Customer Trust
item.description: Supply chain attacks that exploit the trust between software and hardware vendors and their customers are on the rise.

item.title: Full Decryption of Systems Encrypted by Petya/NotPetya
item.description: CrowdStrike researcher shows how to fully recover files encrypted by Petya/NotPetya attacks.

item.title: How Artificial Intelligence is Becoming a Key Weapon in the Cybersecurity War
item.description: As ransomware has grown more advanced it's gained the ability to bring down hospitals, healthcare organizations, manufacturers, corporate firms, and more. CrowdStrike walks you through how artificial intelligence will be a key component in winning the war against sophisticated cyberattacks.

item.title: 5 Steps Endpoint Security Buyers are Taking to Improve Protection
item.description: Learn how security professionals view today’s endpoint protection solutions and the steps they’re taking to improve security

item.title: CrowdStrike Falcon®: Vulnerability Management Comes of Age
item.description: CrowdStrike Falcon® Spotlight, the latest addition to the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform, represents a major evolution in the field of vulnerability management.

item.title: CCleaner Stage 2: In-Depth Analysis of the Payload
item.description: Get in-depth analysis of the CCleaner 5.33 backdoor found embedded in signed versions of the software

item.title: BadRabbit MS17-010 Exploitation Part One: Leak and Control
item.description: A new type of ransomware, Bad Rabbit, has been analyzed by the CrowdStrike Security Response team. Get in-depth analysis of this stealthy new threat in a two-part series.

item.title: BadRabbit MS17-010 Exploitation Part Two: Elevate Privileges
item.description: Read part two of a new type of ransomware, Bad Rabbit. CrowdStrike Security Response team goes in-depth for an analysis of this stealthy new threat.

item.title: The 6 Requirements of True Next-Gen Endpoint Protection
item.description: Finding true next-gen endpoint protection means looking behind vendor claims. Learn the elements that make endpoint security truly next-generation.

item.title: New Gartner Report Redefines Endpoint Protection for 2018
item.description: A new Gartner report redefines endpoint protection for 2018, with recommendations for organizations seeking more effective cyber threat defenses.

item.title: What are the Spectre & Meltdown Chip Flaws? - CrowdStrike
item.description: Learn about the Spectre and Meltdown computer chip design flaws, the fixes available, and CrowdStrike's recommendations and tools to track mitigation status.

item.title: Spectre & Meltdown Dashboards: Mitigate CPU Flaws - CrowdStrike
item.description: Learn how a CrowdStrike Falcon® dashboard helps customers mitigate Spectre & Meltdown CPU vulnerabilities with instant visibility across patches and performance.
